actual_work_performed: Created two fresh local Canny micro-matrix prompt profiles at ControlNet strength 0.41 and 0.43, keeping seed, prompt, v3 right-edge-masked control image, and end percent unchanged.
Packaged both profiles through New-WorkflowRunPackage.ps1; static validation passed with zero defects for both packages.
Executed both local ComfyUI run packages; each generated one portrait output and one diagnostic control-map output.
Performed strict whole-image visual QA against the retained 0.42/0.60 W71 candidate.
Made one QA-driven follow-up request change to midpoint ControlNet strength 0.415 with all other variables unchanged.
Packaged and executed the minimum one-sample follow-up rerun, then performed strict whole-image visual QA.

new_local_findings.microlow_041060: Pass with notes; slightly softer and more natural around face and collar edges while retaining clean right edge.
new_local_findings.microstrong_043060: Pass with notes but not preferred; slightly more sharpened and rigid around face and shirt/collar edges.
new_local_findings.microbalance_0415_060: Pass with notes and neutral follow-up; locally safe but not an obvious improvement over retained 0.42/0.60.
new_local_findings.acceptable_local_band: 0.415 to 0.42 strength with 0.60 end percent, same seed, prompt, and v3 right-edge-masked control image.

next_action: Do not promote 0.415 over the retained 0.42/0.60 candidate. Keep MOD-17 Canny target-runtime/final certification blocked until target-runtime proof and broader gates are intentionally run. Continue current local-first project steering with strict Wave70 overlay-first mask repair, preferably mf70_nose.
